title: Van der Poel Outkicks Del Toro, Jorgenson Crashes out of Second Wheel in Wild Gravel Finale
content:
Carnage at Tirreno-Adriatico as slick stretch of sterrato in final 7km provokes crashes, attacks, and miracle saves.

Read the full article at Van der Poel Outkicks Del Toro, Jorgenson Crashes out of Second Wheel in Wild Gravel Finale on Velo.
author: Jim Cotton
